presets.description: Platform-provided preset catalog. Six presets seeded from data/preset-catalog.json.

keys.description: The seeded platform preset slugs. Migrations seed these on module boot; adding a slug here requires updating data/preset-catalog.json.
The preset assigned to newly-provisioned tenants (TenantProvisioned hook seeds a Theme referencing this preset).
Path to the canonical token vocabulary. Loaded at boot by PresetValidator.
Reject writes with token keys not in the vocabulary. Turn false ONLY for beta preset development. Never off in production.
Redis TTL for theme:resolved:{tenant_id}:{mode} — the resolved token map.
Redis TTL for theme:compiled-css:{tenant_id}:{mode} — the signed URL to the compiled CSS artifact.
Preset thumbnail signed-URL TTL — 7 days, since presets don't move often.

WCAG 2.2 contrast target for the ContrastAuditor. 'AA' (default) checks 4.5:1 body / 3:1 large. 'AAA' checks 7:1 body / 4.5:1 large. Findings are ALWAYS informational — this setting only changes the threshold at which recommendations surface.
Run the ContrastAuditor after every ThemeActivated. Surface findings as ThemeAccessibilityRecommendationNotification.
How many prior Theme rows to retain for rollback (default tier). Enterprise tier via theme_rollback_extended entitlement bumps this to 20.
How many prior Theme rows to retain when the tenant has theme_rollback_extended.

Output format for RegenerateRenderedCssJob. Currently only css_custom_properties (CSS variables under :root + .dark scope). Future: 'tailwind_config' (writes a tailwind.config.js snippet) — deferred to v2.
